ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mitigation_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mitigation strategy */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the mitigation strategy */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code for visual representation */,
  "cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the mitigation strategy */,
  "hazard_intensity_impact" REAL /* Impact on hazard intensity */,
  "hazard_high_frequency_cutoff" REAL /* High frequency cutoff for hazard events */,
  "hazard_event_set" TEXT /* Set of hazard events the strategy is designed to mitigate */,
  "mdd_impact_a" REAL /* MDD impact factor A */,
  "mdd_impact_b" REAL /* MDD impact factor B */,
  "paa_impact_a" REAL /* PAA impact factor A */,
  "paa_impact_b" REAL /* PAA impact factor B */,
  "damagefunctions_map" TEXT /* Map of damage functions */,
  "risk_transfer_attachment" REAL /* Risk transfer attachment point */,
  "risk_transfer_cover" REAL /* Risk transfer cover limit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the strategy */,
  "feasibility" TEXT /* Feasibility of implementing the strategy */,
  "sustainability" TEXT /* Sustainability of the strategy */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Environmental impact of the strategy */,
  "community_impact" TEXT /* Impact on the community */,
  "implementation_timeframe" TEXT /* Expected timeframe for implementing the strategy */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the strategy was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the strategy */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hazard_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hazard event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the hazard event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the hazard event (e.g., storm, flood) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the hazard event */,
  "intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the hazard event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hazard event */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the hazard event was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the hazard event */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the hazard event */,
  "affected_areas" TEXT /* List of areas affected by the hazard event */,
  "historical_data" TEXT /* Historical data related to the hazard event */,
  "predicted_impact" TEXT /* Predicted impact of the hazard event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mitigation_hazard_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mitigation strategy */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hazard event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mitigation_hazard_map_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES mitigation_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mitigation_hazard_map_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES hazard_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact assessment */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mitigation strategy */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hazard event */,
  "impact_score" REAL /* Impact score of the strategy on the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the impact assessment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the impact assessment was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the impact assessment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the impact assessment */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the impact assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_assessments_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES hazard_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_assessments_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES mitigation_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost estimate */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mitigation strategy */,
  "initial_cost" REAL /* Initial cost of implementing the strategy */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Annual maintenance cost of the strategy */,
  "lifecycle_cost" REAL /* Lifecycle cost of the strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cost estimate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the cost estimate was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the cost estimate */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the cost estimate */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* List of funding sources for the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_estimates_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES mitigation_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_transfer_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk transfer policy */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mitigation strategy */,
  "attachment_point" REAL /* Risk transfer attachment point */,
  "cover_limit" REAL /* Risk transfer cover limit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk transfer policy */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the risk transfer policy was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the risk transfer policy */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the risk transfer policy */,
  "policy_holder" TEXT /* Entity holding the risk transfer policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_transfer_policies_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES mitigation_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "damage_functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each damage function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the damage function */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., buildings, roads) */,
  "function_type" TEXT /* Type of function (e.g., linear, exponential) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the damage function */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the damage function was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the damage function */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the damage function */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used for the damage function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_damage_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mitigation strategy */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the damage function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_damage_map_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES mitigation_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_damage_map_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES damage_functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the impact factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the impact factor */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the impact factor */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the impact factor was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the impact factor */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the impact factor */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the impact factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_factors_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mitigation strategy */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the impact factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_factors_map_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES impact_factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_factors_map_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES mitigation_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, planner, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last password change */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mitigation strategy being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the strategy */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the strategy was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES mitigation_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mitigation_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mitigation strategy */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the strategy */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in the version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mitigation_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mitigation_versions_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES mitigation_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, planner, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_map_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_map_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
